schedule_metadata.agency_name: Office of the State Inspector General

series_metadata.series_title: Behavioral Health: Reports and Managerial Letters
series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the inspections, investigations, and/or reviews of the quality of services provided by programs licensed, operated, or funded by the Virginia Department of Behavioral Health and Developmental Services, as well as other licensed providers, including licensed programs in state correctional facilities. This series may include, but is not limited to: correspondence and reports. 2.2-309.1(B)(4)

schedule_metadata.agency_name: Office of the State Inspector General

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the supportive research and investigation the division has completed in preparing the Behavioral Health reports and managerial letters. This series may include, but is not limited to correspondence, notes, videos, witness statements, and questionnaires.

schedule_metadata.agency_name: Office of the State Inspector General

series_metadata.series_title: Internal Audit and Training Services: Audit Records
series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the processes of assessing and safeguarding the Commonwealth's assets. This series may include, but is not limited to: audit charters, external qualityassessment reviews, corrective action plans, annual audit plans, risk assessments, audit reports, and peer reviews.

schedule_metadata.agency_name: Office of the State Inspector General

series_metadata.series_title: Internal Audit and Training Services: Training Records
series_metadata.series_description: This series documents training offered by the Office for Continuing Professional Education (CPE) credits. This series may include, but is not limited to: rosters, attendance records, course design and development, and CPE records.

schedule_metadata.agency_name: Office of the State Inspector General

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents investigations of administrative and criminal activities, and the resulting recommendations. This series may include, but is not limited to: notes, personnel information, case write-ups, correspondence, working papers, and reports. COV 2.2-309(A)(5)

schedule_metadata.agency_name: Office of the State Inspector General

series_metadata.series_title: Performance Review Services: Special Project Reports
series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the condition of the accounting, financial, and administrative controls of state and non-state agencies. This series may include, but is not limited to: reports.

schedule_metadata.agency_name: Office of the State Inspector General

series_metadata.series_title: Performance Review Services: Special Project Work Papers
series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the performance review proceedings as well as the analysis and substantiation of the special project reports. This series may include, but is not limited to: spreadsheets and reports.

schedule_metadata.agency_name: Office of the State Inspector General

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the performance reviews and inspections of executive branch and non-state agencies and their efficiency, effectiveness, and/or economy of programs. This series may include, but is not limited to: reports. COV 2.2309(A)(9)

schedule_metadata.agency_name: Office of the State Inspector General

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the performance review proceedings and the analysis of and substantiation for performance review reports. This series may include, but is not limited to: spreadsheets, correspondence, case write-ups, personnel information, and other supporting documentation. COV 2.2-309 (A)(9)
